headline: Best spot today — chest-high SSW with clean cross-off wind.
today: Ditch is the pick of the three: 2-3.5ft SSW swell with W/WNW cross-off wind grooming it clean through the morning and afternoon. Tides are on the small side but there's enough push to work. Shortboard or fish and enjoy it — this is the fun window before the weather gets busier midweek.

daysToWatch.note: Waist-high but light winds all morning means glassy, playful conditions. Log session if you want a mellow one.
Onshore SE 18mph most of the day — swell's there but it'll be rough and crumbly. Not the day.
Big one incoming: 4-6ft-plus S swell, but SW cross-on wind in the morning keeps it messy. Powerful but not clean — for the experienced only.
The standout — 3-5ft S at longer period with cross-off NNE dawn. Get there early for the cleanest, best waves of the week.
